title: Small molecule modulators of par2 and uses thereof
abstract: This invention is in the field of medicinal pharmacology. In particular, the invention relates to a new class of small-molecules having a pyrazino-pyrimidine-dione (or related) structure which function as modulators (activators, inhibitors) of protease activated receptor type 2 (PAR2), and their use as therapeutics for the treatment of conditions involving PAR2 activity (e.g., asthma, chronic pain, cancer and/or vascular disorders).
claims: Claims CLAIMS What Is Claimed Is: 1. A composition comprising a compound having a structure encompassed within one of Formulas I, II, III, IV, V, VI, VII, VIII, IX, X, XI and XII: (Formula VIII), Formula XII), including pharmaceutically acceptable salts, solvates, and/or prodrugs thereof; wherein Ri, R2, R3, R4, and R5 independently include any chemical moiety that permits the resulting compound to activate or inhibit PAR2 biological activity. 2 The composition of Claim 1, wherein Ri is selected from hydrogen, */ wv 3. The method of Claim 9, wherein the subject is experiencing aberrant PAR2 activity. 11. The method of Claim 9, wherein the subject is at risk for experiencing aberrant PAR2 activity. 12. The method of Claim 9, wherein the subject is a human subject. 13. The method of Claim 12, wherein the subject has or is at risk for developing an inflammatory condition involving aberrant PAR2 activity. 14. The method of Claim 13, wherein the inflammatory condition is one or more conditions selected from the group consisting of asthma, migraine related pain, chronic pain, cancer, and a vascular disorder. 15. The method of Claim 13, further comprising administering to the subject one or more anti-inflammatory agents. 16. The method of Claim 15, wherein the anti-inflammatory agent is a non-steroidal anti inflammatory drug. 5 17. A kit comprising (1) a pharmaceutical composition as recited in Claim 8, (2) a container, pack, or dispenser, and (3) instructions for administration.
